_metadata.description: Character appearance seed data for Transformers Animated (2007-2009)

data.name: Optimus Prime (Animated)
data.description: Tall, lean Autobot with exaggerated angular proportions, pronounced chin, and large blue eyes. Red and blue color scheme with oversized axe weapon. Stylized fire truck cab alt mode with elongated front end

data.name: Bumblebee (Animated)
data.description: Small, compact yellow Autobot with an oversized head, wide blue eyes, and horn-like protrusions. Youthful proportions with short limbs and a rounded chest plate. Compact car alt mode

data.name: Prowl (Animated)
data.description: Sleek, slim black and gold Autobot with a visor and ninja-like design. Angular motorcycle kibble on his back forms wing-like silhouette. Minimalist face with a visor and serious expression

data.name: Bulkhead (Animated)
data.description: Massive, spherical green Autobot with a tiny head, enormous round torso, and stubby limbs. One of the most exaggerated Animated designs with a wrecking-ball weapon hand. Gentle expression despite imposing size

data.name: Ratchet (Animated)
data.description: Stocky, barrel-chested red and white Autobot with a grumpy expression and heavy brow. Bulky forearms house magnetic EMP tools. Older, worn appearance reflecting his veteran status

data.name: Sari Sumdac (Animated, Seasons 1-2)
data.description: Small human-presenting girl with dark skin, large expressive eyes, and wild orange-red pigtails. Wears a yellow dress with striped stockings. Carries the AllSpark Key on a string around her neck

data.name: Sari Sumdac (Animated, Techno-Organic)
data.description: Upgraded techno-organic teenager with a taller frame, amber-gold armor plating over her limbs, and retractable energy weapons. Retains orange-red hair but now with a more angular, mature face. Can shift between armored and human-presenting forms

data.name: Grimlock (Animated)
data.description: Large, imposing grey and gold robot with a crown-like head crest and fierce red visor. Dinosaur mode is a massive stylized T-rex with jagged teeth and flame breath. Heavy, angular limbs with clawed hands

data.name: Swoop (Animated)
data.description: Lean grey and gold Dinobot with pteranodon-style wings and a beak-like face. Beast mode is a stylized robotic pteranodon with angular wings and fiery breath capability

data.name: Snarl (Animated)
data.description: Bulky grey and gold Dinobot with a triceratops-inspired head featuring three prominent horns and a shield-like frill. Beast mode is a stylized robotic triceratops with angular plating

data.name: Ultra Magnus (Animated)
data.description: Towering blue, white, and red Autobot commander with a massive square jaw, broad shoulders, and imposing hammer weapon (the Magnus Hammer). Significantly larger than other Autobots with a regal bearing

data.name: Sentinel Prime (Animated)
data.description: Broad-shouldered blue and orange Autobot with an oversized chin and arrogant expression. Carries a shield and lance. Prominent Elite Guard insignia and a snowplow-inspired chest design

data.name: Jazz (Animated)
data.description: Sleek white and black Autobot with a visor and cool demeanor. Slim, athletic build reflecting his cyber-ninja training. White sports car kibble with stylized racing stripes

data.name: Blurr (Animated)
data.description: Extremely thin, elongated blue Autobot with a streamlined body and pointed chin. One of the most stylized Animated designs with an impossibly narrow torso and long legs built for speed

data.name: Jetfire (Animated)
data.description: Orange and white Autobot jet twin with fire-based powers. Young, slim build with flame-styled accents and wing kibble. Speaks with a Russian-inspired accent alongside his brother Jetstorm

data.name: Jetstorm (Animated)
data.description: Blue and white Autobot jet twin with wind-based powers. Mirror design to Jetfire with swirling air-themed accents instead of flames. Young, energetic appearance

data.name: Safeguard (Animated)
data.description: Combined form of Jetfire and Jetstorm, a large white jet with both fire and wind elemental powers. Symmetrical design merging orange and blue accents from the twin components

data.name: Cliffjumper (Animated)
data.description: Small red Autobot intelligence agent with a stocky build and horn-like protrusions on his head. Compact design similar in stature to Bumblebee but with a more aggressive expression

data.name: Arcee (Animated)
data.description: Pink and white female Autobot with a slim, graceful build and stylized helmet with wing-like extensions. Angular Art Deco-inspired lines throughout her design. Appears primarily in Great War flashback sequences

data.name: Omega Supreme (Animated)
data.description: Colossal Autobot standing many times taller than regular Transformers, with a simple rounded head, large blue eyes, and a childlike expression. Transforms into the Autobot ship Orion. Red, white, and blue color scheme

data.name: Rodimus Prime (Animated)
data.description: Sleek red, orange, and yellow Autobot with a flame-decorated chest and spoiler wings. Confident, heroic proportions with a pointed chin and visor-style eyes. Leader of Team Athenia

data.name: Ironhide (Animated)
data.description: Stocky red Autobot with a young, tough appearance and heavy-set build. Member of Team Athenia with a rugged, angular design reflecting his strength-focused character

data.name: Hot Shot (Animated)
data.description: Yellow and blue Autobot with a youthful design and eager expression. Member of Team Athenia with a sporty build and racing-inspired styling

data.name: Brawn (Animated)
data.description: Small but powerfully built green Autobot with an oversized upper body and compact legs. Member of Team Athenia with exaggerated musculature reflecting his great strength

data.name: Red Alert (Animated)
data.description: White and red female Autobot medic with a sleek design and medical cross insignia. Member of Team Athenia with a streamlined build and concerned expression

data.name: Wasp (Animated, Autobot Form)
data.description: Green compact Autobot with a rounded head and initially friendly design that becomes increasingly unhinged. Boot camp appearance is clean and military, later prison-damaged with a wild, paranoid expression

data.name: Wasp (Animated, Waspinator Form)
data.description: Techno-organic mutant wasp form with organic insect features merged with robotic parts. Green and yellow striped body, compound eyes, translucent buzzing wings, and a stinger tail. Created by Blackarachnia's experiments

data.name: Wreck-Gar (Animated)
data.description: Bulky brown and orange Autobot made from garbage truck parts with a jagged, rough-hewn appearance. Messy beard-like chin plating and a friendly but confused expression. Carries various junk as accessories

data.name: Alpha Trion (Animated)
data.description: Elderly Autobot elder with a long beard-like chin extension, wizened face, and dignified robes-like plating. Purple and gold color scheme befitting his status as a High Council member

data.name: Yoketron (Animated)
data.description: Ancient, elegant cyber-ninja master with a samurai-inspired design, ornate helmet, and flowing robe-like armor plating. White and gold color scheme with a serene, wise expression

data.name: Highbrow (Animated)
data.description: Tall, thin Autobot council member and intelligence liaison with an intellectual bearing. Angular design with a prominent forehead and monocle-like optic enhancement

data.name: Perceptor (Animated)
data.description: Red and teal Autobot scientist with a microscope-inspired shoulder cannon and a blank, emotionless expression reflecting his self-removed personality components. Angular, precise design

data.name: Wheeljack (Animated)
data.description: White and green Autobot scientist with ear-fin panels that flash when speaking and a faceplate mask. Classic Wheeljack silhouette adapted into the angular Animated style

data.name: Warpath (Animated)
data.description: Stocky red Autobot Elite Guard member with a tank-inspired torso featuring a prominent chest cannon. Compact, powerful build with military styling

data.name: Megatron (Animated)
data.description: Imposing grey and red Decepticon leader with a bucket-shaped helmet, sharp red eyes, and a massive fusion cannon on his right arm. Angular, threatening design with helicopter blade kibble on his back. Tall and broad-shouldered with a pronounced widow's peak helmet

data.name: Starscream (Animated)
data.description: Tall, lanky grey and red Seeker with an extremely pronounced chin, forward-swept wings, and a scheming expression. Exaggerated angular proportions with long limbs and null-ray cannons mounted on forearms

data.name: Skywarp (Animated)
data.description: Starscream clone with identical body type but in purple and black color scheme. Cowering, fearful expression and hunched posture reflecting his cowardly personality trait

data.name: Thundercracker (Animated)
data.description: Starscream clone with identical body type in blue color scheme. Preening, self-admiring posture and narcissistic expression reflecting his ego personality trait

data.name: Sunstorm (Animated)
data.description: Starscream clone with identical body type in gold and yellow color scheme. Bright, radiant coloring with an overly pleasant, flattering expression reflecting his sycophantic personality

data.name: Ramjet (Animated)
data.description: Starscream clone with identical body type in white and maroon color scheme. Shifty, untrustworthy expression and a conical head modification resembling a battering ram, reflecting his compulsive liar personality

data.name: Slipstream (Animated)
data.description: Female Starscream clone with a distinctly feminine frame, teal and purple color scheme, and VTOL-capable wings. Smirking, confident expression with a more streamlined build than the other clones

data.name: Blitzwing (Animated)
data.description: Large, bulky tan and purple triple changer with a unique rotating three-faced head: Icy (blue monocled face), Hothead (red angry face with gritted teeth), and Random (black jack-o-lantern face). Broad shoulders with jet and tank kibble

data.name: Lugnut (Animated)
data.description: Massive, hunched purple and green Decepticon with a single large red optic, pincer-like claws, and enormous bomb-shaped fists housing the P.O.K.E. weapon. Bomber plane kibble with a bulky, top-heavy silhouette

data.name: Lockdown (Animated)
data.description: Lean, menacing bounty hunter with a patchwork appearance from collected trophies and mods. Dark green and black with a hook-hand weapon and a skull-like face. Muscle car kibble with spikes and aftermarket modifications

data.name: Blackarachnia (Animated)
data.description: Techno-organic spider femme with a black and gold color scheme, four spider legs protruding from her back, and organic web-spinning abilities. Curvaceous humanoid upper body contrasts with arachnid lower elements. Fanged face with multiple red eyes in beast mode

data.name: Shockwave (Animated)
data.description: Towering purple Decepticon spy with a single yellow optic, elongated clawed hands, and a massive hunched frame. Distinctly different from his disguise as Longarm Prime, a friendly-looking teal and orange Autobot with extendable arms

data.name: Soundwave (Animated)
data.description: Blue and grey Decepticon with a boombox-inspired chest, visor face, and speaker-themed design elements. SUV alt mode with musical instrument styling. Carries Laserbeak as a guitar accessory

data.name: Laserbeak (Animated)
data.description: Small robotic bird that transforms from an electric guitar. Red and black with angular wing shapes and a sharp beak. Serves as Soundwave's surveillance minion

data.name: Ratbat (Animated)
data.description: Small robotic bat that transforms from a keytar. Purple and black with angular wing membranes and sonic attack capabilities. Serves as Soundwave's minion alongside Laserbeak

data.name: Swindle (Animated)
data.description: Tan and purple Decepticon arms dealer with a smooth, salesman-like demeanor reflected in his grinning face. Compact build with a Humvee-inspired alt mode and hidden weapon compartments throughout his body

data.name: Scrapper (Animated)
data.description: Stocky green and purple Constructicon with a front-end loader bucket as a hand and a simple, dim-witted expression. Bulky industrial design with construction vehicle kibble and a hard hat-like helmet

data.name: Mixmaster (Animated)
data.description: Bulky grey and purple Constructicon with a cement mixer drum on his back and a perpetually intoxicated-looking expression. Industrial build with a rough, unrefined appearance and mixing drum weapon

data.name: Dirt Boss (Animated)
data.description: Diminutive green Constructicon leader with a forklift alt mode, oversized head with a visor, and cerebro-shell launcher. Tiny but domineering, standing much shorter than his Constructicon teammates

data.name: Strika (Animated)
data.description: Massive, heavily armored female Decepticon with a multi-wheeled tank alt mode. Dark purple and olive color scheme with a powerful, imposing build and stern expression. One of the largest Decepticons in Animated

data.name: Oil Slick (Animated)
data.description: Dark green and black Decepticon with a ram skull-shaped motorcycle cowling and chemical warfare equipment. Sinister design with vials and containers of toxic substances integrated into his frame

data.name: Blackout (Animated)
data.description: Dark blue and black Decepticon with a beetle-like airship alt mode and electromagnetic pulse generators. Rounded, insectoid design with prominent EMP antenna arrays

data.name: Spittor (Animated)
data.description: Green and orange Decepticon with a frog-like bipedal design, wide mouth, and bulging eyes. Tongue-like cables extend from his mouth as weapons. Squat, amphibian-inspired proportions

data.name: Cyclonus (Animated)
data.description: Purple and grey Decepticon with a sleek aircraft-inspired design and horned helmet. Streamlined build with swept-back wings and a menacing angular face

data.name: Isaac Sumdac (Animated)
data.description: Short, round Indian-American man with a large bald head, thick black mustache, and lab coat. Oversized head with tiny spectacles in the exaggerated Animated art style. Kindly expression with a prominent nose

data.name: Captain Fanzone (Animated)
data.description: Stocky, gruff Detroit police captain with a square jaw, receding hairline, and perpetually frustrated expression. Wears a brown trench coat over his uniform. Thick eyebrows and a prominent scowl

data.name: Porter C. Powell (Animated)
data.description: Slim, smug corporate businessman with slicked-back hair, a sharp suit, and a self-satisfied smirk. Angular face with a pointed nose in the exaggerated Animated style

data.name: Meltdown (Animated)
data.description: Supervillain with a translucent, glowing yellow-green acidic body and a skeletal face visible through his corrosive skin. Wears the remnants of a hazmat suit. Drips acid and melts anything he touches

data.name: Headmaster (Animated)
data.description: Scrawny, bespectacled young man with messy brown hair and a smug expression. Pilots a spider-like control unit that clamps onto robot bodies, replacing their heads with his cockpit module

data.name: Nanosec (Animated)
data.description: Wiry human villain in a yellow and black speed suit with lightning bolt motifs. Initially young and athletic, rapidly ages to elderly due to the suit's side effects. Blurred motion lines in his Animated design

data.name: Angry Archer (Animated)
data.description: Flamboyant human villain in a medieval Robin Hood-style outfit with a green hat, feathered cap, and tech-enhanced bow and arrows. Exaggerated angular chin and dramatic cape in the Animated style

data.name: Professor Princess (Animated)
data.description: Stocky female human villain in a pink princess costume with a tiara, riding a weaponized flying unicorn. Carries a magic wand that fires energy blasts and explosive kitten-shaped projectiles. Deceptively cute appearance

data.name: Slo-Mo (Animated)
data.description: Female human villain with a retro-styled appearance, wearing a watch-themed outfit with clock motifs. Wields a pocket watch device powered by an AllSpark fragment that slows time around her targets

data.name: Master Disaster (Animated)
data.description: Large, flashy human villain with a showy announcer appearance, wild hair, and a loud outfit. Carries an AllSpark fragment-powered remote control that can override vehicle systems including Cybertronians

data.name: Colossus Rhodes (Animated)
data.description: Human villain who operates a large mechanical battle suit. The suit is bulky and industrial with heavy armor plating. The pilot inside is a normal-sized man dwarfed by his oversized mech
